bird.name: Okinawa woodpecker
bird.summary: The Okinawa woodpecker (Dendrocopos noguchii) (ノグチゲラ, Noguchigera) is a woodpecker endemic to the Okinawa Prefecture of Japan. Taxonomy Oth…

relations.subject: Okinawa woodpecker
relations.evidence: This woodpecker has a single tiny population which is threatened by habitat loss of mature forest due to logging, dam construction, agriculture, military and golf course developments
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Okinawa woodpecker
relations.evidence: This woodpecker has a single tiny population which is threatened by habitat loss of mature forest due to logging, dam construction, agriculture, military and golf course developments
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
